sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, content String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '     Hello, world!     ');
SELECT trimBoth(content) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET content = trimBoth(content) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_strings WHERE trimBoth(content) = 'Hello, world!';
